title: elymus pungens subsp. pungens
intro: Elymus pungens subsp. pungens, also known as the sharp-leaved wheatgrass or sharp-leaved wildrye, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Elymus pungens subsp. pungens include its potential to soothe digestive problems, alleviate fever, and act as an antispasmodic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
